---
title: "Chapters for this course"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: flatly
    toc_float: true
---

# Chapter 1 here.. 

```{r, eval=FALSE}

library(tidyr)
library(sf)

```


## Creating landforms from DEM

```{r, eval=FALSE}

# This is where you will load the DEM image

```


## Testing summary

```{r}

summary(cars)

```


## Testing python here

```{r}

print("Hello World")

```
